authority: PI analysis 2026-07-20 (docs/PI_ANALYSIS_RL_LADDER_AND_RISK_HEADROOM_2026-07-20.md); input to the auditor's freeze process. Opens NO seeds.
supersedes_instrument_of: program_s_product_mix_risk_interaction_gsa_v1 (S1 instrument invalidated 2026-07-18: transducer skeleton not action-independent under PRODUCTION_QUALITY_SURGE, replay error 1.3558e-05 vs frozen 1e-10; STOP_MASK_BEFORE_INEXACT_SCREEN)
scientific_question_unchanged: Does any researcher-defined, mechanism-relevant risk envelope create clairvoyant product-mix headroom (H_PI_safe) that the risk-free Program O environment lacks?

seed_policy.burned_751x_block: PERMANENTLY EXCLUDED (7510001-7510012 opened by the failed S1 run; no selective reuse, no mask exclusion on those tapes)
seed_policy.confirmation_block: TBD_BY_AUDITOR, opens only on screen promotion + independent authorization

g0_adversarial_exactness_first.coverage: every mask x {all-C, all-H, static, oracle, modal} calendars x all 12 dev tapes x extreme Morris points
g0_adversarial_exactness_first.gate: transducer vs direct SimPy, ret tolerance 1e-10, fail-closed per mask
g0_adversarial_exactness_first.purpose: catches action-dependent skeletons (e.g. R14 defect/rework) on day zero

per_mask_instrument_routing.action_dependent_masks: direct SimPy, or a corrected transducer admitting action-dependent skeletons only after its own parity re-certification
per_mask_instrument_routing.early_exit_rule: a mask failing G0 stops THAT mask only; LOC/CROSS masks proceed; rule is prospective in this contract, not retrofitted

incremental_screen.stage_b: remaining 11 tapes only for points that are exact AND show preliminary oracle headroom

worker_efficiency.batching: persistent worker processes, many points per worker, no per-shard interpreter launch
worker_efficiency.caching: risk tapes, demand streams, and common episode prefixes cached across points

cascade.pruning: where SimPy-direct is required, certified bounds/B&B or cheap surrogate to LOCATE candidate regions; exact values only where needed

search_vs_confirmation.confirmation_only: full 65,536-calendar enumeration + all Class-B guardrails run only in promoted cells on fresh sealed seeds

risk_envelope_design.base: Garrido Table 6.12 two-level (-/+) coding per risk; our levels may differ and are disclosed as a researcher-defined stress envelope
risk_envelope_design.relevance_mapping_frozen: R11/R14 -> Op5-7, R21/R22 -> LOCs, R24 -> demand; R12/R13/R23 excluded with recorded reasons; R3 frozen (per program_o_relevant_risk_sensitivity_v1)

nonstationary_axis.allowed: regime-switching risk intensity as an envelope axis (thesis §8.5.1 stationarity limitation is the license)
nonstationary_axis.control: matched stationary envelope delivering the same total risk mass; estimand is the DIFFERENCE in adaptive headroom

risk_envelope_design.selection_asymmetry: envelopes with oracle H<=0 die a fortiori; H>0 promotes a hypothesis only; conversion tested on fresh seeds under the confirmation phase

guardrails_unchanged: Class A/B gates of the S1 contract carry over verbatim at freeze time (resources, placebos, anti-shed incl. worst-product fill, demand ledger, custody)
freeze_checklist_for_auditor: fix preliminary headroom bar and promotion count
port Class A/B gate text verbatim from program_s_product_mix_risk_interaction_gsa_v1
G0 script + tests (including an R14-class action-dependence regression test)
hash this contract and the design doc into the launch manifest
